stemHtml: Which of the following is true regarding land use and wildlife attraction in relation to managing bird hazards?

options.a: Moss and similar ground cover actively repel most bird species, reducing bird numbers.
options.b: Land owners adjacent to aerodromes should not be encouraged to disperse wildlife, as this will lead to a reduction of wildlife on the aerodrome itself.
options.c: Man-made and natural landscapes can attract birds, such as ploughed fields and sewage farms.
options.d: Bird control methods are generally ineffective if performed outside the immediate aerodrome boundary.
